"'''Enemies for Life'''" is an RPG adventure by [[Stephen Luminati]], published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]]. It was reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''.

{{Game-stub}}
